content:
Edmonton Squash Club Junior Membership

Who is an ESC Junior Membership best for

An ESC Junior membership is best suited to ESC members under the age of 25 OR are in school, and want all the booking privileges of a Premium member. PROOF OF STUDENT STATUS MUST BE PROVIDED. For further information about the benefits and booking privileges of an ESC Junior member, please visit: https://edmontonsquashclub.ca/premium-membership/

What is the cost

A junior membership is available at $55/month + GST for any person under the age of 19, or  with a valid student ID. An additional registration fee of $89 + GST will be applied for the first month which includes a free private lesson, and a $15 + GST one time fee for a key fob.

How to register

Just send us an email at info@edmontonsquashclub.ca, call us at 780-306-2395 or come and visit us during staff hours, and we will get you all set up. Make sure you let us know which membership type you’re interested in so we can get you started.
